title: Actuarial Analyst
description: PwC's Actuarial Services practice is expanding in the Pacific Northwest, and we're seeking an Actuarial Analyst to support our insurance and pension consulting projects. This role offers exposure to complex actuarial problems, mentorship from credentialed actuaries, and the support needed to pass actuarial examinations. You'll contribute meaningfully to client projects while building the technical foundation for a successful actuarial career.
responsibilities: Perform actuarial valuations and analyses for pension plans, insurance products, and healthcare programs
Develop financial projections and scenario analyses using actuarial software platforms
Prepare technical documentation, assumptions memos, and client-facing reports
Review and validate data; perform quality assurance on models and calculations
Support senior actuaries in client meetings and proposal development

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Actuarial Science, Mathematics, Economics, or related quantitative field
skills: Familiarity with actuarial software (Prophet, Moses, or similar)
Clear communication of complex technical concepts
certifications: Progress toward actuarial exams (SOA or CAS) expected

benefits: Actuarial exam study support and exam fee reimbursement
